【Now Sports】多位曼聯名宿都認為，多蒙特就山曹轉會一事以退為進，但蜜蜂兵團CEO華斯基立即反擊。
多蒙特早前宣佈備受曼聯青睞的翼鋒山曹在今夏不會離隊，但紅魔名宿史高斯、夏格維斯、雲佩斯同聲表示這支德甲勁旅只是虛張聲勢，希望收取更高轉會費。 華斯基（Hans-Joachim Watzke）表示：「我讀到這些言論。這是像史高斯、夏格維斯這些專家的意見，他們曾經是出色的球員，現在也是足球守家，但我不知道他們同樣是轉會專家。」他更再次強調山曹下季留隊：「這是鐵一般的事實。」 雖然盛傳山曹力爭離隊，但華斯基絕不擔心：「我們跟他的團隊有良好溝通，知道山曹的反應，他明白多蒙特是一支好球隊，他在這裡踢球也獲得很多樂趣。」
又幫皇馬練兵

🗣 A message from Lukasz Piszczek: ⁣
⁣
Dear BVB fans,⁣
⁣
The 20/21 season will be my last as a professional footballer. I want to enjoy this season as consciously as possible. In the past few years I have always loved taking on responsibility together with some of my colleagues and leading the team. In the team council, but also as vice-captain. Now I would like to actively help shape the transition and help others to get involved. For this reason I have decided to give up the position of vice-captain and also my place on the team council. But I will continue to help because I know that my opinion is valued in the dressing room. I will continue to express them in the future and be available to the guys with my advice on any questions they ask me.

Good bye, Legend 💛🖤

-OD29
